title: neillia rubiflora
intro: Neillia rubiflora, also known as the Chinese coralberry, is a deciduous shrub native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Neillia rubiflora include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Neillia rubiflora include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water.
